_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Identity Verification Dialog
_meta.description: This IdentityVerificationDialog component is a polished, enterprise-grade dialog that presents identity verification in a structured and trustworthy way. The centerpiece is a virtual identity card, styled like a real card with a masked ID, name, and validity date, giving users a sense of formality and security. Unlike simple stacked dialogs, this layout uses a two-column design: the card is showcased on the left as the visual anchor, while the right side contains the verification form with clear instructions, a secure PIN input, and action buttons. Built with shadcn/ui and enhanced by Framer Motion animations, the component feels modern, professional, and smooth in interaction. It’s an ideal fit for fintech, enterprise security, onboarding, and KYC workflows, where building user trust and delivering a premium verification experience is essential.
